title: Entrepreneurship Bootcamp
tagline: Launch your venture with mentorship and funding guidance
description: A 6-week intensive program equipping aspiring entrepreneurs with business fundamentals, pitch skills, and access to a mentor network.

title: Ignite Youth Program
tagline: Empowering the next generation of leaders
description: A comprehensive youth development initiative focusing on leadership, communication skills, and community engagement.

title: Women Empowerment Program
tagline: Helping women return to work with confidence
description: Skills training and placement support for women returning to the workforce after a career break.

title: Preventive Healthcare Camps
tagline: Bringing essential medical services to remote villages
description: Mobile clinics delivering free health check-ups, emotional wellness counseling, and essential medicines to underserved communities.

title: Financial Independence Drive
tagline: Equipping communities with essential financial knowledge
description: Interactive workshops teaching saving, investing, budgeting, and the basics of micro-finance to rural and semi-urban populations.

title: Clean & Green India
tagline: Grassroots initiatives for a sustainable environment
description: Community-led afforestation drives, waste management education, and the implementation of solar power in rural schools.
